contact_points.description: At the center of the tea box.
contact_points.usage: Used to hold or grip the tea box from any side.

functional_points.description: At the bottom center of the tea box.
functional_points.usage: Used to place or move the tea box on a flat surface, the direction of the tea box is forward.

functional_points.description: At the bottom center of the tea box.
functional_points.usage: Used to place or move the tea box on a flat surface, the direction of the tea box is backward.
